content:
{{#each data}}
{{label}}
{{score}}{{target}}
{{/each}}
styles: .sbc-kpi-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; padding: 0; font-family: 'Segoe UI', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; } .sbc-kpi-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto auto; align-items: baseline; column-gap: 10px; min-height: 26px; } .sbc-kpi-label { color: #64748b; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .sbc-kpi-meta { display: contents; } .sbc-kpi-value { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; white-space: nowrap; } .sbc-kpi-value--normal { color: #64748b; } .sbc-kpi-value--warn { color: #d97706; } .sbc-kpi-value--good { color: #2563eb; } .sbc-kpi-target { color: #94a3b8; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; }
